must_find.description: Single file contains 7 distinct concerns (pipeline types, git operations, orchestration, JSON parsing, Docker execution, streaming execution, progress tracking) that should be separated into individual modules

PipelineRunner::run_pipeline is documented as 800+ lines handling database lookups, git operations, phase generation, command execution, progress tracking, review handling, and PR creation in a single method
Low-level concerns (JSON line parsing, XML tag extraction, Docker container lifecycle) mixed with high-level orchestration (pipeline runner, auto-promotion policy) in the same module

must_not_flag.description: AutoPromotePolicy::decide is a simple pure function with clear logic — it does not need to be in a separate module despite being in a god file
The slugify function is a small utility closely related to git branch creation and is reasonably co-located with create_git_branch
